summary: Settings Hub Preview Panel, Discount Analytics Dashboard, and Public Endpoint Consolidation testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified. Security issue from iteration 222 has been FIXED - admin settings hub now requires authentication.

issues: Discount Analytics link not prominently displayed on dashboard - accessible via direct URL /admin/discount-analytics or sidebar navigation

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add Discount Analytics quick link to admin dashboard Commercial section or sidebar for better discoverability
critical_code_review_comments: public_branding_routes.py: New /api/public/business-context endpoint correctly consolidates branding + payment_info in single response
public_branding_routes.py: Backwards compatible - /api/public/branding and /api/public/payment-info still work
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: SECURITY FIXED - Now requires admin JWT auth via _require_admin dependency
discount_analytics_routes.py: All 6 endpoints properly protected with admin auth
discount_analytics_routes.py: Risk classification uses same margin thresholds from Settings Hub (single source of truth)
SettingsPreviewPanel.jsx: Live preview shows Navbar, Footer, Email, and Invoice with current form state
DiscountAnalyticsPage.jsx: Full dashboard with KPI cards, trend charts, top products, sales behavior, and high-risk tables
BrandingContext.jsx: Properly fetches from /api/public/branding with fallback values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Hub Preview Panel, Discount Analytics Dashboard, and Public Endpoint Consolidation are fully implemented and tested. Security issue from iteration 222 (admin settings hub not requiring auth) has been FIXED. All public endpoints work without auth, all admin endpoints require JWT auth. Discount Analytics page is at /admin/discount-analytics with KPI cards, charts, and tables.
